title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 443.810 - Penalty for violations
text:
443.810.  Penalty for violations. — Any person who violates any provision of sections 443.805 to 443.812 is guilty of a class D felony.  In addition, in any contested case proceeding, the director or board may assess a civil penalty of up to twenty-five thousand dollars per violation for any violation of any of the provisions of sections 443.701 to 443.893.
(L. 1994 S.B. 718 § 2 subsec. 5, A.L. 1995 H.B. 63, et al., A.L. 2001 S.B. 538, A.L. 2008 H.B. 2188, A.L. 2009 H.B. 382, A.L. 2014 S.B. 491) 
Effective 1-01-17
